nasa_apod.title: Comet R3 (PanSTARRS) Brightens
nasa_apod.explanation: Comet R3 is brightening rapidly -- will it survive?  C/2025 R3 (PanSTARRS) has been slowly brightening and extending an ion tail since its discovery last year.  This shedding mountain of dirty ice puts on its best sky show this month, though, because it passes its closest to both the Sun (April 19) ...
